title: TOGAF® Standard, 10th Edition

title: ArchiMate® 3.2 Specification

title: Zachman Framework Ontology
description: A schema for organizing architectural artifacts that takes into account both who the artifact targets and what particular issue is being addressed.

title: ISO/IEC/IEEE 42010:2011

title: The Open Group Library

title: AWS Well-Architected Framework - Operational Excellence
description: Focusing on running and monitoring systems to deliver business value, and continually improving processes and procedures.

title: AWS Well-Architected Framework - Security
description: Focusing on protecting information and systems. Key topics include confidentiality and integrity of data, and protecting systems from unauthorized use.

title: AWS Well-Architected Framework - Reliability
description: Ensuring a workload performs its intended function correctly and consistently when it's expected to.

title: AWS Well-Architected Framework - Performance Efficiency
description: Focusing on using IT and computing resources efficiently as demand changes and technologies evolve.

title: AWS Well-Architected Framework - Cost Optimization
description: Focusing on avoiding unnecessary costs. Key topics include understanding where money is being spent and selecting the right number of resource types.

title: AWS Well-Architected Framework - Sustainability
description: Focusing on minimizing the environmental impacts of running cloud workloads.

title: AWS Architecture Center
description: Centralized location for all official AWS reference architectures, blueprints, and diagrams.

title: AWS Prescriptive Guidance Catalog
description: Provides time-tested strategies, guides, and patterns to help accelerate your cloud migration, modernization, and optimization projects.

title: AWS Solutions Reference Architecture (SRA)

title: AWS Well-Architected Labs
description: Hands-on labs to help you learn, measure, and build using architectural best practices.

title: Azure Well-Architected Framework - Reliability

title: Azure Well-Architected Framework - Security

title: Azure Well-Architected Framework - Operational Excellence

title: Azure Well-Architected Framework - Performance Efficiency
